news.summary: On 11 June 2025, UAB "Atsinaujinančios energetikos investicijos" concluded a public offering with FMĮ “Orion securities” where they successfully placed 32.274 million Euros worth of Green Bonds in the first series and first tranche, offering an 8.0% yield. This was done under their 100 million Euros unsecured fixed-interest note programme, with the base prospectus receiving approval from the Bank of Lithuania on 27 May 2025. The move highlights the Company's commitment to the Baltic market through a Green Bond Programme. The funds raised from this issuance will go towards refinancing existing bonds with the ISIN LT0000405938.
news.headline: UAB "Atsinaujinančios energetikos investicijos" issued 32.274 MEUR Green Bonds at 8.0% yield to refinance existing bonds.

news.summary: In Corte Madera, California, RH (NYSE: RH) has disclosed its financial performance for Q1 ending on May 3, 2025, through a shareholder letter from Chairman and CEO Gary Friedman. The letter is accessible on the Investor Relations segment of the company's website at ir.rh.com. RH's management will conduct a live conference call and audio webcast today at 2:00 pm PT (5:00 pm ET) as previously communicated. Interested individuals can join the call by dialing 800.715.9871 or 646.
news.headline: RH released Q1 fiscal 2025 results, ended May 3, 2025. Live webcast scheduled at 2pm Pacific Time (5pm Eastern Time).

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has reached a record high of 15%, with over 10 million people currently out of work. Additionally, the inflation rate has risen to 5.2%, the highest it has been in the past decade. The government has announced plans to address these concerning figures through various economic initiatives and policies.

news.summary: Build-A-Bear Workshop, Inc. revealed today that the Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.22 for each share of common stock outstanding (NYSE: BBW). This dividend is set to be distributed on July 10, 2025, to shareholders recorded by June 26, 2025. Build-A-Bear, established in 1997, has grown into a cherished multi-generational brand with a commitment to enhancing life with more warmth and compassion, catering to visitors of all ages.
news.headline: Build-A-Bear Workshop declares $0.22/ share quarterly dividend, to be paid on July 10, 2025 to shareholders as of June 26.

news.summary: The bill proposed by President Trump, with a significant amount of debt, has the potential to accelerate the decline in the value of the US dollar. As inflation is expected to rise, Bitcoin is emerging as a viable hedge against this trend, offering a secure investment option for individuals seeking to protect their assets.
news.headline: Trump's significant bill may lead to US debt crisis, increasing inflation. Bitcoin could benefit from the turmoil.

news.summary: Before joining the team at Alchemy Pay, David Plouffe served as an advisor to a number of notable organizations, including Binance. Additionally, he has worked on the presidential campaigns of former President Barack Obama and former Vice President Kamala Harris.
news.headline: Former Kamala Harris campaign adviser David Plouffe joins Coinbase advisory council after advising other prominent figures and companies.

news.headline: Tammy Barlet of SVA named Bush Institute Stand-To Veteran Leadership Program Scholar, 37 scholars selected.

news.summary: In Denver, Voyager Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: VOYG) has successfully completed its initial public offering of 14,200,645 shares of Class A common stock, with an additional 1,852,258 shares purchased by underwriters at $31.00 per share. The total proceeds generated from this offering amount to roughly $402.3 million after accounting for underwriting discounts and fees.
news.headline: Voyager Technologies Inc. closes IPO of 14,200,645 shares for $31 each, raising $402.3 million in net proceeds.

news.summary: In New York, DigitalOcean Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: DOCN) has revealed a partnership with AMD to offer its customers access to AMD Instinct™ GPUs as DigitalOcean GPU Droplets for AI workloads. Initially featuring the AMD MI300X GPUs, this collaboration will later introduce the AMD Instinct™ MI325X GPUs. This move aims to expand the availability of potent yet cost-effective GPU models for DigitalOcean users seeking to power their AI tasks effectively.
news.headline: DigitalOcean partners with AMD to offer AMD Instinct GPUs for AI workloads. Starting with MI300X GPUs, later adding MI325X GPUs for affordable options.

news.summary: In San Jose, California, Adobe (Nasdaq: ADBE) announced their financial results for the second quarter of fiscal year 2025 ending on May 30, 2025. The company, under the leadership of chair and CEO Shantanu Narayen, highlighted their strategy of providing innovative solutions for Business Professionals, Consumers, Creative, and Marketing Professionals. Adobe reported a strong performance, leading to an increase in their FY25 revenue target. Narayen also emphasized the transformative impact of Adobe's AI innovation on various industries, empowering both individuals and enterprises.
news.headline: Adobe announced record revenue in Q2 and raised FY25 revenue and EPS targets. Chair and CEO, Shantanu Narayen, credits ground-breaking innovation and AI transformation.

news.summary: A recent report highlighted that the unemployment rate in the country has reached 5.2%, representing an increase of 0.3% compared to last month. This rise in unemployment equates to an additional 150,000 individuals who are now seeking job opportunities. The report also disclosed that the economy added 100,000 new jobs in the same period. These figures indicate a fragile labor market situation and a challenging employment landscape for many. In response to this data, policymakers are under pressure to implement strategies to stimulate job growth and support those who are currently unemployed.
news.headline: Harvard supports reinforcing block on Trump's foreign student ban.

news.summary: President Donald Trump increased his criticism of Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell on Thursday, attributing higher U.S. debt costs to Powell's rate policy. Trump referred to Powell as "one numbskull" and accused him of disregarding political factors, claiming that elevated interest payments were a consequence of this. Despite urging Powell for months to decrease rates, Trump expressed frustration at Powell's reluctance, stating, "We can't get this guy to do it." Additionally, Trump dismissed concerns about potential repercussions from firing Powell, asserting, "I don't know why it would be so bad, but I'm not going to fire him." The complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Trump blames Fed chief Powell for higher debt costs, refuses to fire him. Trump accuses Powell of ignoring calls to lower rates, saying "We can't get this guy to do it."

news.summary: The U.S. dollar has hit a low point, the lowest in over two years, while emerging market stocks have surged in an opposite direction in what appears to be the beginning of a trend. The iShares MSCI Emerging Markets ETF (NYSE: EEM) with over 800 EM stocks, experienced its ninth straight day of gains, the longest streak since its establishment in 2016. This pushed it to levels not seen since before Russia's invasion of Ukraine. Otavio Costa, a macro analyst at Crescat Capital, highlighted the importance of recognizing the potential devaluation of the dollar as an investor. Costa emphasized the strategy of investing in natural resources, hard assets, and significantly in emerging markets. Full details on this story are available for reference.
news.headline: US dollar at 2-year low, emerging market stocks rallying inversely, iShares MSCI Emerging Markets ETF up for 9th day, recommended investments in natural resources and emerging markets as dollar devalues.

news.summary: Today, on June 12, 2025, Brixmor Property Group Inc. (NYSE: BRX) unveiled its seventh annual Corporate Responsibility (CR) Report. This report aims to showcase the Company's dedication to enhancing its operations and making a positive impact. Brixmor's CR Report details various strategies, initiatives, and achievements across different areas, underscoring its commitment to responsible business practices. This yearly tradition sheds light on the Company's efforts towards sustainability and corporate ethics, highlighting key metrics and progress made in areas such as environmental stewardship, community engagement, and governance. This release further solidifies Brixmor's position as a leader in the industry, illustrating its ongoing efforts to drive positive change and growth.
news.headline: Brixmor Property Group releases 7th Corporate Responsibility Report, showcasing strategies for improvement.

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, FibroGen, Inc. (NASDAQ: FGEN) disclosed plans for a 1-for-25 reverse stock split of its common stock, set to take effect at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time on June 16, 2025. Following this move, FibroGen's common stock will be traded on a split-adjusted basis starting June 17, 2025, under the same symbol "FGEN" but with a revised CUSIP number 31572Q881.
news.headline: FibroGen to implement 1-for-25 reverse stock split on June 16, 2025, trading on split-adjusted basis from June 17, 2025.
